# format: html5-dompatch-v2
# status: active

Batch index=0 size=25
CreateDocument key=1 doctype=<none>
CreateElement key=2 ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=1 child=2
CreateElement key=3 ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=2 child=3
CreateElement key=4 ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=2 child=4
CreateElement key=5 ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=4 child=5
CreateText key=6 text="before"
AppendChild parent=5 child=6
CreateElement key=7 ns=html local="table" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=4 child=7
CreateText key=8 text="x"
InsertBefore parent=4 child=8 before=7
CreateProcessingInstruction key=9 target="table" data="data"
AppendChild parent=7 child=9
CreateElement key=10 ns=html local="caption" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=7 child=10
CreateText key=11 text="c"
AppendChild parent=10 child=11
CreateElement key=12 ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=4 child=12
CreateText key=13 text="after"
AppendChild parent=12 child=13
